title: Rename CTA button to 'Join 55028198 LHT 💖' with new invite link

requirements.summary: Update the 'Become Poppo Agent' CTA button in AppPreviewSection to display 'Join 55028198 LHT 💖' and link to https://invite-vone.com/Q8QN2D (opening in a new tab)
acceptanceCriteria: The button in the AppPreviewSection displays the text 'Join 55028198 LHT 💖'.
Clicking the button navigates to 'https://invite-vone.com/Q8QN2D' in a new tab.
No other buttons or links on the page are modified.

file_operations.description: Update the 'Become Poppo Agent' CTA anchor element to display the label 'Join 55028198 LHT 💖' and set its href to 'https://invite-vone.com/Q8QN2D'. Ensure the link opens in a new tab by verifying target='_blank' and rel='noopener noreferrer' attributes are present. Do not modify any other buttons or links in this component.
